#### Privacy Policy
Adventis is committed to protecting any personal information you provide in connection with your use of this website (the “Site”). This Privacy Policy, which is fully incorporated in the Terms of Use, describes what information we collect when you visit the Site, how we collect it, how we use it, and the steps we take to protect it.
By using the Site, you consent to our collection and use of information about you in accordance with this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree to the Privacy Policy, you are not authorized to use the Site. Adventis reserves the right, in its sole discretion, to modify this Privacy Policy at any time by posting a notice on the Site’s home page. Any modifications will be effective immediately upon posting on the Site. Your continued use of the Site after the modified terms are posted indicates that you agree to be bound by the modified terms. Therefore, it is your responsibility to review the Site from time to time for any modifications.
#### Location of Servers and Transfer of Information
Our servers are located in the United States. If you are located outside of the United States, please be aware that any information you provide to us will be transferred to the United States. By using our Site or providing your personal information to us, you consent to this transfer and to the collection, storage, processing and use of your personal information in the United States. In addition, our service providers may not be located in your geographic area in the United States. By providing your personal information on the Site, you also consent to the transfer of your data to these service providers.
#### Collection of Personal Information
When you create a user account on the Site, register for courses, or purchase materials directly from us through the Site, we ask you for personally identifiable information, such as your name, postal address, telephone number, email address, and credit card information (“Personal Information”). Adventis will use your personal information only for the purposes for which you provide it, as well as to operate, maintain, and provide to you all of the features and functionality of the Site.
You may choose to receive notifications of new products and services or upcoming courses that we think may be of interest to you. If you no longer wish to receive these notifications, you may let us know at any time by sending an email to “info@adventiscg.com” or contacting us as described below.
#### Anonymous Information Gathered through the Site
Adventis may track and record certain non-personal information of Site users, including your computer’s IP address, operating system, type of browser, referring URL, and time spent on the Site, in order to gain aggregate data that may be analyzed for trends and statistics about how our visitors use the Site. Adventis may use accumulated aggregate non-personal data for several purposes including, but not limited to, Site traffic analysis, evaluation of Adventis’ products and services, and program planning.
#### Cookies
Adventis may employ “cookies” to provide visitors with tailored information to facilitate a person’s use of the Site. A “cookie” is an element of data that a website sends to a visitor’s browser which, in turn, may store that element on the visitor’s hard drive or memory. Any cookies sent by Adventis will be marked so that they will be accessible only by the Site. A visitor may block or delete Adventis’ cookies from the hard drive, but by disabling cookies, certain Site features and functionality may no longer work properly, or at all.
#### Sharing Information with Third Parties
We do not share your Personal Information with anyone except our employees and service providers, such as the companies that help us operate the Site. Credit card transactions are handled by a third-party financial institution and its vendors, which receive the credit card number and other personal identifying information to verify the credit card numbers and process transactions. We may share with third parties certain pieces of aggregated, non-personal information, such as how many users clicked on a particular advertisement. We may use a third-party provider to track and record non-personal information of Site users and provide us with reports based on such information. These providers may use that anonymous information for their internal purposes. The information we share with them does not identify you individually or enable them to contact you.
We reserve the right to disclose and use Personal Information and anonymous information in special circumstances including: to enforce this Privacy Policy or any other part of our Terms of Use; to protect our property or rights; to protect the safety of anyone; to respond to legal process, such as a subpoena; to carry out a merger or consolidation with another entity, a sale or transfer of some or all of our assets, or any similar transaction; or for other reasons we determine in good faith are necessary, appropriate, or required by law.
#### Links with Other Websites
The Site contains links to other websites that are owned or controlled by third parties. Please note that the privacy policies of these websites may differ from those of the Site. Adventis is not responsible for the privacy policies and practices of any linked website. We encourage you to read the privacy policy of any website you wish to visit before disclosing any information.
#### Other Notification
In order to implement or enforce this Privacy Policy or other Terms, Adventis may use information you have provided to contact you.
#### Children under Age 13
Adventis does not knowingly collect any information from children under age thirteen. If you discover that we have collected information from children under age thirteen, please notify us via email at “info@adventiscg.com.” If a child we know to be under age thirteen sends us an email with a question or comment, we may respond using that email address but we will not keep the email address or use it again.
#### Enforcement
If Adventis becomes aware that the security of the Site is compromised or any nonpublic user information has been disclosed to unrelated third parties as a result of external activity or otherwise not in accordance with this Privacy Policy, Adventis will take reasonable remedial measures that it deems appropriate (which may include an internal investigation and reporting, notifying the user, and notifying and cooperating with law enforcement authorities).
#### Security
Adventis will use reasonable efforts to safeguard any Personal Information that you provide through the Site. Nevertheless, no transmission over the Internet can be guaranteed to be 100% secure.

tavily.answer:
Adventis' official website is https://www.adventiscg.com. It offers financial modeling courses and certification programs. Enrollment is available for students and professionals.
Adventis is a financial services company founded in 2008, specializing in financial modeling training and education. It has 2-10 employees and is based in Chicago, Illinois.
Adventis is a financial services company founded in 2008, specializing in financial modeling education. It has 2-10 employees and offers certification programs. The company is based in Chicago, Illinois.
Wellfound is a legitimate job board for startups, offering free access for job seekers and paid plans for employers. It focuses on tech and startup roles, providing a streamlined application process. Users praise its user-friendly interface and direct employer connections.
Dealroom.co is a global data platform providing insights on startups and innovation, founded in Amsterdam in 2013. It offers real-time intelligence and supports decision-making for investors and corporations. The platform collaborates with tech ecosystems worldwide to enhance its data transparency.
